title: Rainbow XP Bar
description: Makes your experience bar cool and colorful rather than the plain green bar!
body:
# Rainbow XP Bar

**Rainbow XP Bar** is a simple yet vibrant resource pack that transforms your experience bar into a beautiful spectrum of colors! No more plain XP bars—now every level you gain will display a dazzling rainbow gradient, making your progress even more exciting.

### Features:
- Changes the XP bar to a rainbow gradient.
- Easy to install and lightweight.
- Fully compatible with Minecraft versions **1.19.x to 1.21.x**.

Perfect for players who want to add a splash of color to their game without affecting the gameplay. Download now and brighten your XP experience!

### Installation:
1. Download the resource pack.
2. Open Minecraft and go to "Options" > "Resource Packs."
3. Click "Open Pack Folder" and place the resource pack file there.
4. Select the "Rainbow XP Bar" pack in the Resource Packs menu.
5. Enjoy the rainbow!

---

If you like the pack, don't forget to follow this project! Have fun and level up in style!
